## Summary

- what changed
- why this change is needed

## Lane Scope

- [ ] Subagent checklist reviewed (`/subagent-check` output linked)
- [ ] CLI implementation limited to assigned task IDs
- [ ] Cloud validation plan included (`Validation` workflow)

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run smoke:prepare`
- [ ] `npm run smoke:run`
- [ ] `npm run smoke:assert`
- [ ] `npm run verify:e2e`
- [ ] `npm run verify:tracked`

## Review Notes

- risk and regression notes
- follow-up items
